description:
The library `org.springframework.security:spring-security-core` version `6.4.2` was detected in `Maven library manager` located at `/home/ecp-app/CNY/o2-basic-management.jar -> BOOT-INF/lib/spring-security-core-6.4.2.jar` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2025-41232`, which exists in versions `>= 6.4.0, < 6.4.6`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Github Security Advisory](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9pp5-9c7g-4r83) with vendor severity: `Critical` (awaiting NVD analysis, [CNA](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-41232) severity: `Critical`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://attackerkb.com/assessments/c3734c78-c018-4e5f-9c70-b5f3c074a411).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `6.4.6` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=org.springframework.security:spring-security-core`.

The library is associated with the technology `Spring Security`.

The library `org.apache.tika:tika-core` version `1.28.4` was detected in `Maven library manager` located at `/home/ecp-app/CNY/o2-basic-management.jar -> BOOT-INF/lib/tika-core-1.28.4.jar -> META-INF/maven/org.apache.tika/tika-core` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2025-66516`, which exists in versions `>= 1.13, <= 3.2.1`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Github Security Advisory](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f58c-gq56-vjjf) with vendor severity: `Critical` ([NVD](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-66516) severity: `Critical`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://hackyboiz.github.io/2025/12/24/gongjae/CVE-2025-66516/).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `3.2.2` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=org.apache.tika:tika-core`.

The library is associated with the technology `Apache Tika`.
